stemHtml:
Given the following information, how much discretionary fuel (formerly called extra fuel) can be carried:

Maximum Take-Off Mass (MTOM): 2100 lb
Zero Fuel Mass (ZFM): 1720 lb
Maximum Landing Mass (MLM): 1900 lb
Fuel tank capacity: 54.5 USG
Fuel at take-off: 32 USG
Trip fuel: 25 USG
Specific density: 0.72
